project_info.name: Cinthya Nascimento Advocacia
project_info.target_audience: Individuals in Brazil needing urgent legal help (especially criminal), workers, retirees, and citizens with various legal demands.

rules: DO NOT use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings. Use Playfair Display to convey legal authority and tradition.
Headings (H1, H2, H3) MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter) and elegant weights (font-medium to font-bold).
Body text MUST use Manrope with generous line height (leading-relaxed) for maximum readability, especially for older demographics (retirees).
Overlines/Labels (e.g., 'ÁREAS DE ATUAÇÃO') MUST be uppercase, small text, with wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]).

colors.theme: Modern Professional with Graphite & Teal Accents (based on logo palette)
rules: Use deep Graphite (#1A1D23) as the primary brand color to anchor the design and communicate professionalism.
Use the Accent Teal (#5B9A8B) for subtle elegance (e.g., borders, small icons, hover underlines, secondary text).

CRITICAL: The primary conversion goal is WhatsApp. Use the official WhatsApp Green (#25D366) for the fixed floating button and primary direct-contact CTAs. Ensure high contrast (white text/icon) on the green button.
Never use pure black (#000000); use #1A1D23 instead to keep the design alive with subtle teal undertones.

surfaces: Glassmorphism (The 'Crystal' Variant) MUST be used for the sticky navigation header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-200. NEVER use completely transparent backgrounds where content scrolls underneath.
Solid Dark Backgrounds (bg-slate-900) for the Hero (if image overlay) and Footer sections to create stark contrast and authority.
Subtle 1px borders (border-gray-200) for grid items and cards to maintain a crisp, technical legal look without heavy shadows.
shadows: Avoid heavy drop shadows. Use subtle ambient shadows (shadow-sm or shadow-md) mixed with crisp borders.

grids_layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8, p-12, py-20, py-24 for section padding to give breathing room. Legal matters are stressful; the design must feel calm and structured.
practice_areas_bento: Use 'MODE A: THE TETRIS GRID' for the Practice Areas section on the Home Page.
Make 'Direito Criminal' and 'Penal Militar' (the urgent areas) span larger sections (e.g., col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2).
Other areas (Cível, Trabalhista, etc.) can be smaller squares (col-span-4).
This asymmetry creates visual interest over a standard 3-column list.
general: Max width containers (max-w-7xl) to keep content constrained and readable.
Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh on mobile.

rules: Use framer-motion for elegant, serious entrance animations (fade in and slight translate-y upward).
Hover states on practice area cards: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and a subtle border color change to Accent Gold.
Button interactions: scale-up slightly on hover, active state scale-down.
Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Buttons MUST have clear focus states (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-brand_primary).
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-floating-button').
Form inputs must have visible labels and clear error states.

image_urls.description: Brass justice scale and gavel on a wooden desk, symbolizing law and justice. Use with a dark overlay (bg-slate-900/70) so white hero text is readable.
Statue of lady justice. Good for abstract representation of the firm's values.
Modern office interior. Represents the firm's environment.
Professional woman in modern office. Use this as a temporary placeholder for Cinthya Nascimento until her real photo is provided.
Large courthouse building with columns. Good for 'Direito Público' or background textures.

global: Sticky Navbar: Logo placeholder (left), Navigation Links (center, hidden on mobile), WhatsApp CTA (right), Mobile Menu Toggle.
Floating WhatsApp Button: Fixed bottom-right. High z-index. MUST animate/pulse gently to attract attention for urgent queries.
Footer: Dark background, large elegant typography, contact info, OAB number, fast links.

Home: Hero: Full-height or 80vh. High-impact image background with dark overlay. H1: 'Defesa Jurídica Especializada e Urgente'. Subtitle: 'Atendimento humanizado em todo o Brasil'. CTA: 'Falar com Especialista Agora' (WhatsApp link).
Practice Areas (Bento Grid): Highlight Criminal, Military Penal, Civil, Social Security, Labor, Tax, Public.
Differentials: 3-column grid with Lucide icons (National Coverage, Urgent Focus, Clear Language).
About Teaser: Image left, text right. Button: 'Conheça nossa história'.
How it Works: Simple 3-step process (Contato > Análise > Ação).
Final CTA: Large block, dark background, compelling text to contact via WhatsApp.
AreasDeAtuacao: Grid: Detailed cards for all 7 areas with specific descriptions. Each card has a 'Tirar Dúvida' WhatsApp button.
Sobre: Deep dive into Cinthya's history, the OAB/PA 38.939 credential, mission, and values.
Use the Lawyer Placeholder image here alongside the text.
Contato: Split layout: Left side with direct contact info (WhatsApp, Email, Operating Hours), Right side with a Shadcn-based Contact Form.

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React (using .js files, NOT .tsx), Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Lucide React, Shadcn/ui.
component_creation: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural marketing layouts to allow asymmetrical creativity.
Use Shadcn components ONLY for interactive logic (Forms, Inputs, Buttons, Dialogs) but heavily customize their Tailwind classes to match the 'High-End Corporate' theme.
Do not use generic Card components if they force a rigid equal-grid look. Build custom divs for the Bento Grid.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: NEVER create generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, or uniform styling.
DO NOT apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Target specific properties.
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }). It disrupts reading flow.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable to ensure the design looks expensive and calm.
All interactive elements MUST have micro-animations and clearly defined hover/active/focus states.
Create depth through layered elements and z-index hierarchy.
Always use 'data-testid' on interactive elements for testing.
Ensure all text color contrasts pass accessibility checks, particularly when text sits over images or dark backgrounds.
DO NOT use emojis as icons. Always use proper SVG icons from lucide-react.
Use .js extension for React component files, not .tsx.
The primary goal is Lead Generation: The WhatsApp button must be impossible to miss.
